title: Chasing Pavements
why_this_song: Chasing Pavements by Adele (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 21 times; first heard in: "Should I give up?"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Or should I just keep chasin' pavements"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "should" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "should" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "keep" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Don't need to think it over
Or should I just keep chasin' pavements

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Chasing Pavements" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Chasing Pavements" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Chasing Pavements" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Chasing Pavements"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Adele one question about "Chasing Pavements", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Adele sobre "Chasing Pavements", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
